headline: Tennessee American Water Recognizes 250th Birthday of U.S.
summary: Tennessee American Water's Phillip D. Glass is now wearing a Tennessee America 250 commemorative shirt, marking the founding of the United States.

headline: American Water Named to TIME's World's Most Sustainable Companies 2026 List
summary: American Water (NYSE: AWK), the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., announced today that is has been named one of the World's Most Sustainable Companies in 2026 by Statista Inc. and TIME.

headline: Calgon Carbon Wins AWWA Innovation Award for PFAS Destruction Breakthrough
